label: Features
heading: Everything you need to ship with confidence.

items.title: Blazing Fast
items.description: Optimized for speed at every layer. Your users get sub-second load times, every time.

items.title: Developer First
items.description: Built by developers, for developers. Clean APIs, great docs, and zero magic.

items.title: Scales With You
items.description: From prototype to production. No architecture changes needed as you grow.

items.title: Secure by Default
items.description: Enterprise-grade security out of the box. SOC 2, GDPR, and HIPAA compliant.
